description: Attio is a flexible, no-code CRM and knowledge base platform that helps teams organize and find information quickly.
authentication: Email/password login, SSO via OAuth, API key for programmatic access.
self_serve: Free trial available with self-serve onboarding and no-code interface.
api_surface: Attio offers a REST API with endpoints for records, relationships, and queries. API authentication is via API key. Documentation is available at https://docs.attio.com/api.
buildability: High – provides API, webhooks, SDKs, and no-code integration options.
main_blocker: Limited API coverage and rate limits; some advanced features are only available through the UI.
